title: Creamy British Napa Cabbage Soup
description: A kid-friendly and vegan-friendly creamy British soup featuring napa cabbage that is both sour from lemon juice and rich with cream for a comforting meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup heavy cream or plant-based milk (such as almond or soy milk)
ingredients.notes: use to achieve a creamy texture

ingredients.name: Optional: Fresh herbs like parsley or dill (chopped), optional garnish

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onions and garlic, sauté until soft and translucent.
Add napa cabbage to the pot. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes until softened but still slightly crisp.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to low, cover pot, and let cook for about 20-30 minutes or until cabbage is very tender.
In another small saucepan, whisk together heavy cream or plant-based milk with lemon juice and a pinch of salt. Heat gently over medium-low heat until warm but not boiling.
Stir the heated cream mixture into the pot with the cabbage. Taste for seasoning, adding more salt and pepper as needed.
Serve hot. Garnish each bowl with a sprig of fresh herbs if desired.
